name: Bocaditos Charred Tomato Mint Salsa
recipeIngredient: 1 slice white onion, thick, pan roasted
2 serrano chilies with seeds, roughly chopped
3 large fresh mint leaves, finely chopped
1/4 teaspoon cumin seed, toast and grind
recipeInstructions:
1. PAN ROAST: Begin by blistering the tomatoes on a cast-iron skillet (comal). Pan-roast with the onion slice and garlic to develop sweeter flavors. Roast until deeply browned and soft.
2. Toast the cumin seeds over medium heat.
3. Chop together with a knife or food processor the tomatoes, onion, garlic until you have a coarsely textured salsa.
4. Add the chilies, cilantro, mint, cumin, water, and salt. Mix briefly to ensure the salsa is chunky.
5. Cover tightly and store in the refrigerator up to 2 days.
